answer: repositories, branches, commits, and pull requests
A README file contains information about the project.
The changes on your branch will be incorporated into the main branch.

1. In the upper-right corner of any page, select , then click New repository.
2. In the "Repository name" box, type hello-world.
3. In the "Description" box, type a short description.
4. Select whether your repository will be Public or Private.
5. Select Add a README file.
6. Click Create repository.
